home.heroSub:
Domestic & international trade and service of plastic raw materials
Commodity · Engineering · Special Engineering · Modified Plastics
home.aboutTitle:
A Professional Trading Service Provider
Focused on Plastic Materials
home.aboutP1: Qinbo New Materials operates two entities — Shanghai Qinbo and Haikou Qinbo — focusing on plastic raw-material sales and service. The business covers domestic trade and international import/export, with imported resin distribution and modified-material customization.
home.aboutP2: Backed by a stable supply-chain network and strict quality management, we build long-term, trustworthy partnerships with downstream manufacturers through reliable supply and professional technical service.
home.productsTitle: Four material systems, down to in-stock grades
home.tradeTitle: A Materials Supply Network Across China and Overseas
home.tradeP: Dual bases, warehouse nodes, domestic cooperative provinces and overseas cooperation regions support spot supply and nationwide delivery.
home.tradeLi1: Domestic Trade Covering East and South China core regions, fast response and flexible allocation
home.tradeLi2: Import/Export Partnering with quality overseas suppliers, legitimate channels and stable supply
home.tradeLi3: One-Stop Service Material selection, quotation, logistics and technical support in full coordination
home.strengthTitle: Earning Trust Through Scale and Service
home.ctaTitle: Looking for a Reliable Plastic Raw Material Partner?
home.ctaSub: Contact Qinbo Sales for quotes, lead times and material-selection advice.
home.searchPh: Search grade, material or producer — e.g. R370Y, 8150, M90-44, Chimei

source.d: Multi-channel supply chain at home and abroad, with stable prices and lead times.

quality.d: Strict incoming inspection and quality-traceability system.

tech.d: A professional team providing material selection and application support.

service.d: Fast quotation and response, flexibly meeting customer needs.

general.name: Commodity Plastics
general.brief: Commodity resins such as PP, PE, ABS and EVA for packaging, daily goods and appliances.

engineering.name: Engineering Plastics
engineering.brief: Engineering plastics such as PA, PC, POM, PC/ABS and PBT for automotive, electronics and machinery.

modified.name: Modified Plastics
modified.brief: Reinforced, flame-retardant, toughened and weather-resistant systems customized to application conditions.

special.name: Special Engineering Plastics
special.brief: High-performance materials such as PPS, PEEK, PEI, LCP, PPO and PTFE for demanding conditions.

products.bannerSub: Filter by four systems and resin families; search concrete grades and reference properties
products.ctaSub: Tell us the grade, producer, quantity or application; Sales will match available stock, alternatives and technical documents.
products.descGeneral: Bulk commodity resins widely used in packaging, daily necessities, appliance housings and pipes — stable supply, full range of specifications.
products.descEngineering: High-performance engineering plastics with excellent mechanical, heat- and chemical-resistance properties for demanding automotive, electronics and precision-machinery applications.
products.descModified: Functional modified plastics customized to client needs, offering reinforcement, flame-retardant, toughening, weathering and other modification solutions and formulation services.
products.customTitle: Formulations tailored to your application — virgin resin available
products.customDesc: Glass-fiber reinforcement, flame retardancy, toughening, weathering, conductive/anti-static and mineral filling — built on PP/PA/PC/ABS/PBT bases, with 100% virgin-resin options plus sampling and formulation support.
products.case1d: 100% virgin-resin base for consistent properties; ideal for quality-sensitive and cosmetic parts.
products.case2d: PA66 + 30% glass fiber: greatly improved stiffness and heat resistance for automotive structural brackets.
products.case3d: Halogen-free flame retardancy up to UL94 V-0, for appliance and electronics housings.

about.bannerSub: A professional trading service provider focused on plastic materials
about.introTitle: A specialist trader in plastic raw materials
about.introP1: Qinbo deals in commodity, engineering, modified and specialty plastics, thermoplastic elastomers and recycled resins, with particular strength in engineering plastics. We hold import/export rights covering general, entrepot and export trade.
about.introP2: We are a direct distributor for Sinopec, PetroChina, CNOOC, Covestro, Chimei, Formosa, LCY, Nan Ya, SK, LG, BASF, Dow, DuPont, Asahi Kasei, Toray, Mitsubishi and more, shipping most resins directly from multiple Sinopec and Sinotrans warehouses in East China.
about.introP3: With a consultative-selling approach, we analyze the market together with our clients, keep broadening our product range, and provide one-stop sourcing and a stable, reliable materials supply chain.
about.shDesc: Based in the core Yangtze River Delta market, serving as the East-China operations and international-trade hub, connecting quality suppliers at home and abroad.
about.hkDesc: Leveraging South China and Free Trade Port advantages to expand import/export business and regional distribution, strengthening supply-chain resilience.
about.ctaTitle: Looking Forward to a Long-Term Partnership
about.ctaSub: Discover the material support Qinbo can provide for your business.
about.cultTitle: Ability has no size; attitude decides everything
about.cultBiz: Business PrincipleSurvive through quality, grow through reputation
about.cultQuality: Quality PolicyQuality drives volume, efficiency, reputation and survival
about.cultMgmt: Management PhilosophyPeople first — integrity, technology, unity and pragmatism
about.partnerDesc: As a direct distributor for Sinopec, PetroChina, CNOOC and many leading resin producers worldwide, we offer genuine, reliably-supplied materials.
about.whTitle: East China and Haikou Warehousing · Stable Supply
about.whDesc: Sinopec, CMST, bonded-area and Haikou warehouse nodes support multi-region shipment and nationwide delivery.

trade.mapDesc: Highlighting dual bases, warehouse nodes, domestic cooperative provinces and overseas cooperation regions across Qinbo’s supply network for manufacturing customers.

trade.bannerSub: Domestic distribution and international trade services
trade.domP: Backed by its Shanghai and Haikou dual bases, Qinbo has built a flexible, efficient distribution system across East and South China core markets, quickly responding to procurement and allocation needs.
trade.domLi1: Regional Coverage East and South China core manufacturing clusters
trade.domLi2: Flexible Allocation From small batches to bulk procurement, supplied on demand
trade.domLi3: Fast Delivery Localized inventory and logistics coordination
trade.intlP: Qinbo has mature import/export capabilities, partnering with quality overseas suppliers in Europe, the US, Japan, Korea and the Middle East to provide imported resin distribution through legitimate channels, with complete documentation and reliable quality.
trade.intlLi1: Import Distribution Genuine OEM resins through legitimate, traceable channels
trade.intlLi2: Customs & Logistics Full import/export process and documentation service
trade.intlLi3: Stable Supply Long-term overseas partnerships and continuous supply
trade.flowTitle: Full-Process Coordination from Selection to Delivery
trade.flow1d: Understanding applications and technical requirements to match materials precisely.
trade.flow2d: Offering grade recommendations and competitive quotations.
trade.flow3d: Domestic distribution and import customs clearance, delivered on schedule.
trade.flow4d: Ongoing technical and supply assurance for long-term cooperation.
